newsitems.title: Playoffs at the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike"
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
Playoffs at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major begin tomorrow and the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike" awaits.

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c9131e2a48d99e4396581c0faa68467307e993c3.png[/img]

For the second consecutive Major, FURIA and Team Spirit finished Stage III with perfect 3-0 records. Aurora, Falcons, and Vitality finished 3-1, and 9z Team, BetBoom, and G2 Esports advanced with 3-2 records.

The Lanxess Arena will host the Playoffs, beginning with Thursday's Quarterfinals matchups:
[list]
[*] 9z Team vs. FURIA
[*] Aurora vs. BetBoom
[/list]The second set of Quarterfinals takes place Friday, featuring:
[list]
[*] G2 Esports vs. Team Spirit
[*] Falcons vs. Vitality
[/list]
With Semifinals on Saturday and the Grand Finals on Sunday, we're in for a great weekend of Counter-Strike.

As the Playoffs approach, there's still time to support your favorite teams. Team and player stickers are still available, with 50% of tournament item sales being shared with the tournament organizer, teams, and players.

And don't forget, all Playoff picks for the Pick'Em Challenge must be submitted prior to the first Playoff match beginning; you don't want to miss your Diamond Coin!

Vitality are looking to win their third straight Major. Will anyone stop them? Tune in and find out!
newsitems.contents_en:

And don't forget, all Playoff picks for the Pick'Em Challenge must be submitted prior to the first Playoff match beginning; you don't want to miss your Diamond Coin!

Vitality are looking to win their third straight Major. Will anyone stop them? Tune in and find out!
newsitems.title_cn: 季后赛在“反恐精英大教堂”举行
newsitems.contents_cn:
IEM 科隆 2026 Major 季后赛将于明天开始，“反恐精英大教堂”正等待着您。

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c9131e2a48d99e4396581c0faa68467307e993c3.png[/img]

FURIA 和 Team Spirit 连续第二年以 3-0 的完美战绩结束了第三阶段的Major。 Aurora、Falcons 和 Vitality 以 3-1 获胜，9z Team、BetBoom 和 G2 Esports 以 3-2 战绩晋级。

朗盛竞技场将举办季后赛，从周四的四分之一决赛对决开始：
[列表]
[*] 9z Team 对阵 FURIA
[*] Aurora 与 BetBoom
[/list]第二组四分之一决赛将于周五举行，其中包括：
[列表]
[*] G2 Esports 与 Team Spirit
[*] 猎鹰队 vs. 活力队
[/列表]
随着周六的半决赛和周日的总决赛，我们将迎来一个精彩的《反恐精英》周末。

随着季后赛的临近，您仍然有时间支持您最喜欢的球队。球队和球员贴纸仍然可用，比赛物品销售的 50% 与比赛组织者、球队和球员分享。

并且不要忘记，Pick'Em 挑战赛的所有季后赛选秀权都必须在第一场季后赛比赛开始之前提交；你不想错过你的钻石币！

活力队希望连续第三次赢得大满贯冠军。有人会阻止他们吗？收听并找出答案！

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop.[/p][/*][*][p]Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.[/p][/*][*][p]Added appropriate error message when user's inventory is full and they try to redeem Weekly Care Package rewards, Armory items, or items in the Major Shop cart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed number wrapping rules in some languages.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop.[/p][/*][*][p]Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.[/p][/*][*][p]Added appropriate error message when user's inventory is full and they try to redeem Weekly Care Package rewards, Armory items, or items in the Major Shop cart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed number wrapping rules in some languages.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 科隆 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]在科隆 2026 主要商店中添加了过去 7 天内最低和最高标价的显示。[/p][/*][*][p]在主菜单上的科隆 2026 主要枢纽图块中添加了贴纸展示。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]在存储单元存款/检索用户界面中添加了多选功能。[/p][/*][*][p]当用户的库存已满并尝试兑换每周护理包奖励、军械库物品或主要商店购物车中的物品时添加了适当的错误消息。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了某些语言的数字换行规则。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: brianlev
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added ability to bookmark stickers in Cologne 2026 Shop.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added convar r_spectator_flashbang_opacity to control flashbang opacity for remote spectators.[/p][/*][*][p]Flashbang effect for remote spectators now renders underneath the HUD.[/p][/*][*][p]Stability improvements[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Updated clipping to prevent certain boost locations[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from Steam Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added ability to bookmark stickers in Cologne 2026 Shop.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added convar r_spectator_flashbang_opacity to control flashbang opacity for remote spectators.[/p][/*][*][p]Flashbang effect for remote spectators now renders underneath the HUD.[/p][/*][*][p]Stability improvements[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Updated clipping to prevent certain boost locations[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from Steam Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]添加了在 Cologne 2026 商店中为贴纸添加书签的功能。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]添加了 convar r_spectator_flashbang_opacity 来控制远程闪光弹的不透明度观众。[/p][/*][*][p]远程观众的闪光效果现在在 HUD 下方呈现。[/p][/*][*][p]稳定性改进[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]古代[/p][list][*][p]更新了剪辑以防止某些增强地点[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]已从 Steam 创意工坊更新至最新版本 ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: IEM Cologne 2026
newsitems.author: brianlev
newsitems.contents:
The IEM Cologne 2026 Major is fast approaching. Teams are making final adjustments, fine-tuning their strats, and crossing their fingers that they won't face Vitality until the Grand Final. That can only mean one thing: Tournament Items featuring Teams and Player Autographs are now available for purchase!

[h3]The 2026 Cologne Major Shop[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8f7212f18c038fcecaa6c96cfeb9785f14d74489.png[/img]
The Major Shop has undergone some major renovation--now you can directly get any sticker you want (at prices set by demand). Holo Furia logo? You got it. Foil Donk autograph? No problem. 

You can purchase tokens and redeem them for any sticker you want. The prices of stickers will depend on relative demand (when lots of players buy a particular sticker, its price goes up and other sticker prices go down), but if you're worried that a sticker might drop in price right after you buy it, we've got you covered. If a sticker price drops by more than 25 tokens within 24 hours of your purchase you'll get a refund of tokens for the total difference.

Details about the Major Shop renovation and how this all works can be found in the FAQ below.

[h3]Souvenir-O-Matic[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8b98a1ee99bd0178265c42624a4ee8d41ac91768.png[/img]
What will you bring to the signing session? Now you can craft your own Souvenir! Take any normal or Souvenir quality weapon in your inventory and select a completed match and one of the players. You'll get your weapon back in Souvenir quality with gold team, autograph, and map stickers applied.

[h3]Pick'Em[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b50091a00523a82121c1e9707ca7a92276d21349.png[/img]
Purchase and activate a Cologne 2026 Viewer Pass, and you'll receive a 2026 Cologne Major Challenge Coin. Play the Pick'Em Challenge to upgrade your Challenge Coin from Bronze to Silver, Gold, or Diamond and with each upgrade you'll get 300 tokens that you can redeem for the stickers or souvenirs of your choice.

[h3]Supporting the Teams[/h3]
As with previous Majors, 50% of the tournament item sales are shared with the Tournament Organizer, Teams, and Players. But this time the royalty rates depend on performance. Between now and the end of the Major royalty rates for token sales are based on the teams' VRS seeding, and after the Major the royalty rates will be based on the Major final standings. The breakdown is in the FAQ, below.

So clear your schedule and tune in, as the Major returns to the Cathedral of Counter-Strike!

[h2]FAQ[/h2]

[h5]Q. Why aren't you selling capsules?[/h5]
In the past we shipped team and player autograph stickers in capsules. While this approach was popular, we've heard feedback that players might prefer to purchase stickers directly. Additionally, players in certain regions cannot purchase sticker capsules. So we're exploring alternatives that allow all players to participate.

[h5]Q. How do I get tournament items?[/h5]
Add any sticker or stickers you like to your cart, and check out. To complete your transaction, first you'll purchase and activate tokens, and then redeem those tokens for your sticker.

Sticker purchases are final and cannot be refunded. If you cancel your transaction before activating your tokens, those tokens _can_ be refunded. If you cancel your transaction after activating your tokens, the tokens will remain in your balance (and cannot be refunded) but you can redeem them for something else.

[h5]Q. How are sticker prices set?[/h5]
The prices of all stickers depend on relative demand. This means that if one sticker is purchased disproportionately more than another, its price will go up and the other sticker's price will go down. After a large number of stickers are sold, all sticker prices will update (you'll get a warning if you're shopping when this is about to happen). The prices in tokens you see are the same prices for everyone worldwide.

[h5]Q. Why do I have to purchase tokens?[/h5]
Tokens are a little less convenient than just paying for stickers outright. But the reality is that if stickers could be refunded after being purchased, then the sticker prices would not accurately represent real demand.

[h5]Q. Can I pre-purchase tokens?[/h5]
No. Tokens are only purchased when you're buying stickers and do not already have enough tokens in your balance. In that case, you'll be asked to purchase the exact number of tokens required (minimum 100, which is $0.99 USD) to complete your transaction.

[h5]Q. What if the sticker price goes down after I redeem my tokens?[/h5]
If the price of any redeemed sticker decreases by 25 tokens or more within the next 24 hours, we'll automatically issue you a refund of tokens for the difference between your redemption price and the lowest price in that period. Refunds are automatically credited to your tokens balance after one week.

[h5]Q. How do souvenirs work this time?[/h5]
Take any weapon of normal or souvenir quality in your inventory and select a completed match and one of the players from that match. You'll permanently convert that weapon into a Souvenir with gold team, autograph, and map stickers applied. You will have a chance to see a preview of your souvenir before you complete your purchase.

If the weapon had any existing stickers, they will be removed before you craft your souvenir.

[h5]Q. How are souvenir prices determined?[/h5]
Souvenir prices are determined by two factors: the demand for the specific gold team and autograph stickers involved, and the rarity of the weapon you choose for your souvenir.

[h5]Q. How are royalties shared among the tournament organizer, teams and players?[/h5]
50% of total Major Shop and Major Pass revenue is shared as royalties with the tournament organizer, teams, and players. The chart below shows how that 50% is distributed. Note that for each team position, half of the royalties are shared with the team organization, and the other half is split equally among the five players.

Between now and the grand final, royalties are shared based on the teams' global VRS leading into the event. After the grand final, royalties will be shared based on the final standings.

[table]
[tr][th]Position[/th][th]Royalty[/th][/tr]
[tr][td]Tournament Organizer[/td][td]5.0%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]1[/td][td]2.85%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]2[/td][td]2.53%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]3[/td][td]2.25%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]4[/td][td]2.25%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]5[/td][td]2.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]6[/td][td]2.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]7[/td][td]2.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]8[/td][td]2.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]9[/td][td]1.78%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]10[/td][td]1.78%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]11[/td][td]1.78%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]12[/td][td]1.56%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]13[/td][td]1.56%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]14[/td][td]1.56%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]15[/td][td]1.35%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]16[/td][td]1.35%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]17[/td][td]1.15%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]18[/td][td]1.15%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]19[/td][td]1.15%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]20[/td][td]1.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]21[/td][td]1.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]22[/td][td]1.00%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]23[/td][td]0.90%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]24[/td][td]0.90%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]25[/td][td]0.81%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]26[/td][td]0.81%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]27[/td][td]0.81%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]28[/td][td]0.76%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]29[/td][td]0.76%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]30[/td][td]0.76%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]31[/td][td]0.72%[/td][/tr]
[tr][td]32[/td][td]0.72%[/td][/tr]
[/table]

newsitems.contents_cn:
IEM 科隆 2026 Major 即将来临。各支队伍正在做最后的调整，微调他们的策略，并祈祷他们在总决赛之前不会遇到活力队。这只能意味着一件事：带有球队和球员签名的锦标赛物品现在可供购买！

[h3]2026年科隆主要商店[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8f7212f18c038fcecaa6c96cfeb9785f14d74489.png[/img]
主要商店进行了一些重大整修——现在您可以直接获得您想要的任何贴纸（价格根据需求而定）。赫洛·弗利亚标志？你明白了。箔唐克亲笔签名？没问题。 

您可以购买代币并将其兑换成您想要的任何贴纸。贴纸的价格将取决于相对需求（当很多玩家购买特定贴纸时，其价格会上涨，而其他贴纸价格会下降），但如果您担心购买后贴纸的价格可能会立即下跌，我们可以为您提供保障。如果标价在购买后 24 小时内下降超过 25 个代币，您将获得总差价的代币退款。

有关主要商店翻新及其运作方式的详细信息，请参阅下面的常见问题解答。

[h3]纪念品-O-Matic[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8b98a1ee99bd0178265c42624a4ee8d41ac91768.png[/img]
你会带什么去参加签名会？现在您可以制作自己的纪念品了！拿起库存中的任何普通或纪念品品质的武器，然后选择一场已完成的比赛和其中一名玩家。您将获得带有金队、亲笔签名和地图贴纸的纪念品品质的武器。

[h3]挑选他们[/h3]
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b50091a00523a82121c1e9707ca7a92276d21349.png[/img]
购买并激活 2026 年科隆观众通行证，您将收到一枚 2026 年科隆特级挑战赛硬币。参加 Pick'Em 挑战，将您的挑战币从铜牌升级为银牌、金牌或钻石牌，每次升级，您将获得 300 个代币，您可以用这些代币兑换您选择的贴纸或纪念品。

[h3]支持团队[/h3]
与往届特锦赛一样，锦标赛物品销售额的 50% 与锦标赛组织者、队伍和选手分享。但这一次的版税率取决于表现。从现在到Major 结束期间，代币销售的特许权使用费率基于各团队的 VRS 种子数，Major 结束后，特许权使用费率将基于 Major 最终排名。详细信息请参见下面的常见问题解答。

因此，请清理好您的日程安排并收看少校重返《反恐精英》大教堂的消息！

[h2]常见问题解答[/h2]

[h5]问。为什么不卖胶囊？[/h5]
过去，我们用胶囊运送球队和球员的签名贴纸。虽然这种方法很受欢迎，但我们听到反馈称玩家可能更喜欢直接购买贴纸。此外，某些地区的玩家无法购买贴纸胶囊。因此，我们正在探索允许所有玩家参与的替代方案。

[h5]问。我如何获得锦标赛物品？[/h5]
将您喜欢的任何贴纸添加到购物车，然后结账。要完成交易，首先您需要购买并激活代币，然后用这些代币兑换您的贴纸。

贴纸购买是最终的，不能退款。如果您在激活代币之前取消交易，这些代币_可以_被退还。如果您在激活代币后取消交易，代币将保留在您的余额中（并且无法退款），但您可以将其兑换为其他东西。

[h5]问。标价是如何设定的？[/h5]
所有贴纸的价格取决于相对需求。这意味着，如果一张贴纸的购买量多于另一张贴纸，则其价格将会上涨，而另一张贴纸的价格将会下降。大量贴纸售出后，所有贴纸价格都会更新（如果您在即将发生这种情况时购物，您会收到警告）。您看到的代币价格对于全世界每个人来说都是相同的。

[h5]问。为什么我

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: brianlev
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAJOR ][/p][list][*][p]The IEM Cologne 2026 Major Hub is now available. Visit the hub to purchase tournament items, play the Pick'Em Challenge and more.[/p][/*][*][p]Purchase a Cologne 2026 Viewer Pass to receive an upgradable Cologne 2026 Coin. With an active pass, you can upgrade your coin and earn rewards by playing the Pick'Em Challenge. Additionally, you will show up on the Active Pass Leaderboard where you can compare your Pick'Em Challenge performance to your friends.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ UI ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of incorrect scoreboard timeline presentation in overtime.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed weapon entities disallowing pickup from showing pick up weapon hint text.[/p][/*][*][p]Increased spectator in-eye flash amount.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Souvenir quality items can now be selected in Trade Up Contract alongside normal quality items. All Souvenir attributes will be removed from any souvenir items selected, and the result of a Trade Up Contract will be a single normal item of a quality one higher, from a collection of all of the items selected for exchange.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where tire fire particles were flickering in the advanced video preview.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted finger animation on Bayonet model.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAJOR ][/p][list][*][p]The IEM Cologne 2026 Major Hub is now available. Visit the hub to purchase tournament items, play the Pick'Em Challenge and more.[/p][/*][*][p]Purchase a Cologne 2026 Viewer Pass to receive an upgradable Cologne 2026 Coin. With an active pass, you can upgrade your coin and earn rewards by playing the Pick'Em Challenge. Additionally, you will show up on the Active Pass Leaderboard where you can compare your Pick'Em Challenge performance to your friends.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ UI ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of incorrect scoreboard timeline presentation in overtime.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed weapon entities disallowing pickup from showing pick up weapon hint text.[/p][/*][*][p]Increased spectator in-eye flash amount.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Souvenir quality items can now be selected in Trade Up Contract alongside normal quality items. All Souvenir attributes will be removed from any souvenir items selected, and the result of a Trade Up Contract will be a single normal item of a quality one higher, from a collection of all of the items selected for exchange.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where tire fire particles were flickering in the advanced video preview.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted finger animation on Bayonet model.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAJOR ][/p][list][*][p]IEM 科隆 2026 Major Hub 现已推出。访问中心购买锦标赛物品、玩 Pick'Em 挑战赛等。[/p][/*][*][p]购买科隆 2026 观众通行证即可获得可升级的科隆 2026 硬币。凭借有效通行证，您可以升级您的硬币并通过玩 Pick'Em 挑战赛来获得奖励。此外，您将出现在 Active Pass 排行榜上，您可以在其中将您的 Pick'Em 挑战表现与好友进行比较。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ UI ][/p][list][*][p]修复了加时赛中计分板时间线显示不正确的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了武器实体不允许拾取显示拾取武器提示的问题text.[/p][/*][*][p]增加观众眼内闪光量。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]现在可以在换购合同中选择纪念品品质的物品和普通品质的物品。所选纪念品的所有纪念品属性都将被删除，而换购合同的结果将是从所有选择用于交换的物品的集合中获得质量更高的单个普通物品。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了高级视频预览中轮胎起火颗粒闪烁的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了刺刀上的手指动画型号。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player and grenade collision.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted material blending to improve accuracy of footstep sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several gaps reported by players.[/p][/*][/list][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a gap in the wall.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player and grenade collision.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted material blending to improve accuracy of footstep sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several gaps reported by players.[/p][/*][/list][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a gap in the wall.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]调整了玩家和手榴弹的碰撞。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了材质混合以提高脚步声的准确性。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了由玩家。[/p][/*][/list][p]古代[/p][list][*][p]修复了墙上的一个缺口。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ SPECTATING ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of post-processing glitch when switching spectator targets on maps with different post-processing volumes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of stuck x-ray silhouettes when switching spectator targets.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed spectator damage overlay effect.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit (default value "2") to apply ladder inaccuracy to players boosted by a stack of this many or more players.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to AWP draw to idle animation transition.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved consistency of grenade jump throws and the accuracy of the jump throw preview camera.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted model for window covers to show collision / decals when shot.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to player clipping and grenade clipping around windows, window covers, and vent entrance.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the activator for OnPlayerUse to always be the player[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the caller for OnPlayerUse to always be the used entity[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the value of CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a potential crash in exception handling[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ SPECTATING ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of post-processing glitch when switching spectator targets on maps with different post-processing volumes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of stuck x-ray silhouettes when switching spectator targets.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed spectator damage overlay effect.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit (default value "2") to apply ladder inaccuracy to players boosted by a stack of this many or more players.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to AWP draw to idle animation transition.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved consistency of grenade jump throws and the accuracy of the jump throw preview camera.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted model for window covers to show collision / decals when shot.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to player clipping and grenade clipping around windows, window covers, and vent entrance.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the activator for OnPlayerUse to always be the player[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the caller for OnPlayerUse to always be the used entity[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the value of CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a potential crash in exception handling[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 观看][/p][list][*][p]修复了在具有不同后处理体积的地图上切换观众目标时出现后处理故障的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了切换观众目标时 X 射线轮廓卡住的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了观众伤害叠加效果。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit（默认值“2”），以将梯子不准确度应用于由这么多或更多玩家叠加的玩家。[/p][/*][*][p]调整 AWP 绘制到空闲动画过渡。[/p][/*][*][p]改进了手榴弹跳投的一致性和跳投预览相机的准确性。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]调整了窗盖的模型，以在以下情况下显示碰撞/贴花[/p][/*][*][p]调整了窗户、窗盖和通风口周围的玩家剪裁和手榴弹剪裁。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 地图脚本][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]添加Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]添加 Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]添加 Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]添加 CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]添加CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]添加了CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]将 OnPlayerUse 的激活器更改为始终为玩家[/p][/*][*][p]更改了 OnPlayerUse 的调用者始终是使用的实体[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON 的值[/p][/*][*][p]修复了异常处理中潜在的崩溃[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: daVinci1980
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Added grating to some windows to make them block bullets.[/p][/*][*][p]Tweaks to player and grenade clipping.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to cancel a grenade throw after the throw was started near the end of the pin pull animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Miscellaneous stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ TOOLS ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed bug that prevented the asset in use from being selected when model browser was opened.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug with layered materials with same surface property on all layers. [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]Added roundmvpanthem_02 for all NIGHTMODE II music kits which plays at 1:5 ratio.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Added grating to some windows to make them block bullets.[/p][/*][*][p]Tweaks to player and grenade clipping.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to cancel a grenade throw after the throw was started near the end of the pin pull animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Miscellaneous stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ TOOLS ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed bug that prevented the asset in use from being selected when model browser was opened.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug with layered materials with same surface property on all layers. [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]Added roundmvpanthem_02 for all NIGHTMODE II music kits which plays at 1:5 ratio.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]修复了地图中的各种漏洞[/p][/*][*][p]修复了各种材质的表面类型。[/p][/*][*][p]向某些窗口添加了光栅，使其能够阻挡子弹。[/p][/*][*][p]对玩家和手榴弹进行了调整剪辑。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了在拉针动画接近结束时开始投掷手榴弹后可以取消投掷的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]其他稳定性改进。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ 工具][/p][list][*][p]修复了打开模型浏览器时无法选择正在使用的资源的错误。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了所有图层上具有相同表面属性的分层材质的错误。 [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]为所有 NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件添加了 roundmvpanthem_02，以 1:5 比例播放。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]

newsitems.title: NIGHTMODE II Music Kits
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
Today we are releasing six new music kits with NIGHTMODE Records. NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available in the STORE tab, featuring:
[list]
[*] ALRT, DOPAMINE HIT
[*] Altare, Change My Mind
[*] borne, Give It To Me
[*] Pirapus, EVERYNITE
[*] Repiet & Julia Kleijn, On And On
[*] ShockOne, Voices
[/list]Alongside new music kits, we've continued updating Cache and made other miscellaneous fixes. 

Release Notes for today's update can be found [url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]here[/url].
newsitems.contents_en:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
Today we are releasing six new music kits with NIGHTMODE Records. NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available in the STORE tab, featuring:
[list]
[*] ALRT, DOPAMINE HIT
[*] Altare, Change My Mind
[*] borne, Give It To Me
[*] Pirapus, EVERYNITE
[*] Repiet & Julia Kleijn, On And On
[*] ShockOne, Voices
[/list]Alongside new music kits, we've continued updating Cache and made other miscellaneous fixes. 

Release Notes for today's update can be found [url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]here[/url].
newsitems.contents_cn:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
今天，我们将与 NIGHTMODE Records 一起发布六款新音乐套件。 NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件现已在 STORE 选项卡中提供，其中包括：
[列表]
[*] 警报，多巴胺发挥作用
[*] 阿尔塔，改变我的想法
[*] 承担，给我
[*] 皮拉帕斯，每夜
[*] Repiet 和 Julia Kleijn，《On And On》
[*] ShockOne、声音
[/list]除了新的音乐包之外，我们还继续更新缓存并进行其他杂项修复。 

今天的更新的发行说明可以在[url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]此处[/url]找到。

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: tomd
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map.[/p][/*][*][p]Simplified grenade clipping in various areas.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed sounds and surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Orange wire spool at Sandbags has been exchanged for white wire.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available for purchase in standard and StatTrak versions through the STORE tab.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed progressive refinement rendering Source Film Maker.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]User Viewmodel FOV now correctly networks to remote clients.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player model occlusion bounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed ragdolls missing death velocity when shot in specific body locations.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ground smoothing transitions when leaving the ground and when landing.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where post-processing transitions weren't smooth (e.g. at the end of freeze time).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where map guides for Ancient wouldn't load in the nighttime version[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted score values for various weapons in Deathmatch.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted XP limits in Deathmatch and Arms Race.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map.[/p][/*][*][p]Simplified grenade clipping in various areas.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed sounds and surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Orange wire spool at Sandbags has been exchanged for white wire.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available for purchase in standard and StatTrak versions through the STORE tab.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed progressive refinement rendering Source Film Maker.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]User Viewmodel FOV now correctly networks to remote clients.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player model occlusion bounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed ragdolls missing death velocity when shot in specific body locations.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ground smoothing transitions when leaving the ground and when landing.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where post-processing transitions weren't smooth (e.g. at the end of freeze time).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where map guides for Ancient wouldn't load in the nighttime version[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted score values for various weapons in Deathmatch.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted XP limits in Deathmatch and Arms Race.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][列表][*][p]修复了地图中的各种漏洞。[/p][/*][*][p]简化了各个区域的手榴弹剪辑。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了各种材料的声音和表面类型。[/p][/*][*][p]沙袋的橙色线轴已修复交换为白线。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ 音乐套件 ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件现在可以通过 STORE 选项卡购买标准版本和 StatTrak 版本。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]修复了渐进细化渲染源影片Maker。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]用户视图模型视野现在可以正确地联网到远程客户端。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了玩家模型遮挡边界。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了布娃娃在特定身体中射击时丢失死亡速度的问题[/p][/*][*][p]对离开地面和着陆时的地面平滑过渡进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了后处理过渡不平滑的情况（例如在冻结时间结束时）。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了古代地图指南在夜间无法加载的情况版本[/p][/*][*][p]调整了死亡竞赛中各种武器的得分值。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了死亡竞赛和军备竞赛中的 XP 限制。[/p][/*][/list]
